notes:
Improvements

• Rebuilt the Weapon Creator template system
• Added full support for loading weapon and component data directly from template files
• Improved Rockstar XML formatting parity
• Component LOD now defaults to 300 while weapons remain at 500

Fixes

• Fixed template values not matching selected weapons
• Fixed melee weapon audio handling and <Audio /> preservation
• Fixed component metadata loading issues
• Fixed hardcoded fallback values and export inconsistencies
